steps: Prepare LBv2 medium (LB medium supplemented with 204mM NaCl, 4.2mM KCl and 23.14mM MgCl2)
Grow overnight (ON) culture of V. natriegens.
Centrifuge 1 mL of ON culture at 3000 rcf, 1min.
